top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/04 - BEEDS User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Environment – Statistical Taxonomy v1.3.1 FINAL
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocate freight
top_signals.summary:
As the freight market undergoes a rapid reallocation of transportation responsibility, customer pick-up arrangements are reversing and causing incremental rate increases.

The post SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocate freight appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
